author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Plan: Add a build.rs to ferray-ufunc that detects Windows target and injects a compat header declaring signgam via CFLAGS/DEP_CORE_MATH_* env. Also add the compat header file itself. This works around core-math-sys vendored lgamma.c using POSIX-only signgam global. Ref: GitHub issue dollspace-gay/ferray#5
